# Evidence

- Anthropic, "Effective context engineering for AI agents": compaction and persistent notes are first-line techniques for long-horizon work.
- "Lost in the Middle": high-value instructions belong near the start and end of the prompt.
- Microsoft/Salesforce sharded-prompt findings summarized by Drew Breunig: long incremental conversations degrade badly once the model commits to a wrong path, so a fresh handoff is often better than repairing the same chat.

Full source list: [shared references](../../REFERENCES.md)
